name: NOCOPI TECHNOLOGIES INC/MD/
summary: Nocopi Technologies, Inc. is a Maryland corporation that develops and markets specialty reactive inks for entertainment/toy products and document/brand authentication. Key products include Rub-it & Color technology (color-activation inks for coloring books, games, activity kits) and Copimark and Rub & Reveal systems for anti-counterfeiting and anti-diversion. Revenues come from product sales and licensing/royalty fees to domestic and international licensees and their licensed printers.

products.name: Rub-it & Color
products.description: Specialty inks revealed by rubbing, used in coloring books, activity kits, greeting cards, board games, and promotional products; safe, non-toxic, ASTM D4236 and F-963 compliant.

products.name: Copimark
products.description: Proprietary document authentication system enabling invisible printing on documents or packaging to detect counterfeiting.

products.name: Rub & Reveal
products.description: Patented security ink system providing document and brand authentication to reduce fraudulent reproduction and product counterfeiting.
